properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v4 v3 v5 v5 v6 v7 v5 v5 v8 v8 v8 v8 v5 v5

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Ev'ry knee; will bow Ev'ry tongue, confess Ev'ry heart; will cry out Your Name You are welcome, You're welcome

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Ev'ry life, will see The glory of our King Jesus come; and reign in our hearts You are welcome, You're welcome

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Holy Spirit come; come in power My life is Yours, my life is Yours Holy Spirit come; start a fire My life is Yours, my life is Yours!

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: God of heav'n and earth We long for more of You Come and meet; with us as we pray You are welcome, You're welcome

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Here I am; send me Here I am; send me Here I am; send me, God!

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: Holy Spirit come; come in power My life is Yours, my life is Yours Holy Spirit come; start a fire My life is Yours, my life is Yours

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Holy Spirit come; come in power My life is Yours, my life is Yours Holy Spirit come; start a fire My life is Yours, my life is Yours! …

verse.name: v8
verse.lines: Send me; to the nations Send me; to my neighbours Send me; with Your love!
